title: Memory Walk

{{Quote|You are strong, Lord Krayt—But I know who you are, who you were, and where your weaknesses lie!|Darth Wyyrlok, to Darth Krayt|<ref name="Legacy—War 1">[[Legacy — War 1|''Legacy — War'' 1]]</ref>}}
'''Memory Walk''', also known as '''torture by chagrin''', was a [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Force power/Legends|ability]] that [[Telepathy/Legends|reached into the mind]] and forced a target to relive their worst memories. It was used over the millennia by various [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] groups, including the [[Sorcerers of Tund/Legends|Sorcerers]] of [[Tund/Legends|Tund]] and the [[Order of the Sith Lords]].

==Description==
Memory Walk was a [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Force power/Legends|ability]] that consisted of [[Telepathy/Legends|mentally reaching]] into the victim's mind, forcing them to relive all the worst memories of their life, both painful ones and ones that were merely embarrassing, over and over and over again<ref name="BOS" /> to the point where it almost seemed to cause physical pain. Discovered by the Sorcerer [[Rokur Gepta]], he found that after a brief session of [[Torture/Legends|torture]] by chagrin, the subjects demonstrated a slight increase in intelligence and efficiency after they recovered. For this reason he used it regularly on the crew of his personal command ship, the ''[[Wennis]]''.

==Users==
Memory Walk was used over the millennia by various [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] groups,<ref name="BOS" /> including the [[Sorcerers of Tund/Legends|Sorcerers]] of [[Tund/Legends|Tund]]<ref name="KOTORCG" /> and the [[Order of the Sith Lords]].<ref name="BOS" />

Githany used this power to force Bane to reconnect with the dark side and move past his fear and concern of the Force, a power she had been taught by her Jedi Master when she had similarly lost touch with her mental hold over the Force.<ref name="Darth Bane: Path of Destruction">''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''</ref> Bane's student, Darth Zannah would become a master of this power, using it as a deadly weapon.<ref name="Darth Bane: Rule of Two">''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]''</ref>

When Gepta captured [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], he planned to use torture by chagrin to kill him. Half an hour of it and Lando was in pain like he'd never known before; Gepta believed he could make Lando last for several weeks before the gambler's mind finally snapped and he died. To make the process more personal, the [[Sorcerers of Tund/Legends|Sorcerer of Tund]] had created a machine which would amplify his power and allow him to pick and choose which memories Lando would relive. The machine would also let Gepta ''alter'' the memories to be even worse than they were already. Fortunately for Calrissian, a squadron of [[Renatasia/Legends|Renatasians]] attacked, distracting Gepta long enough for the gambler to execute a plan to escape.

Nearly a century, later this ability was used by [[Darth Maladi]] and [[Cade Skywalker]] against each other on the world of [[Wayland trap|Wayland]].<ref name="Legacy 2006 46">[[Legacy (2006) 46|''Legacy'' (2006) 46]]</ref> [[Darth Wyyrlok (III)|Darth Wyyrlok III]] wielded this technique in his [[Assault on the Temple of the Sith|duel]] against [[Darth Krayt]].<ref name="Legacy—War 1">[[Legacy — War 1|''Legacy — War'' 1]]</ref>
